message:
fix(test_helpers): add missing allowlist_layer check in verify_corpus_case

The ExpectedLog struct had an allowlist_layer field that was never
checked in verify_corpus_case, silently ignoring test expectations.

Also fixes snake_case lint in cli_e2e.rs test name.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
